name: MyGolfConditioning.com
about: My Golf Conditioning is a golf training studio located at 2 Pearl Street in East Greenwich, RI. It offers a range of services including private lessons, group workshops, junior programs, and golf fitness instruction. The facility utilizes advanced tools, including a state-of-the-art golf simulator, to provide personalized coaching and video swing analysis to golfers of all skill levels. Services are structured around various lesson packages, short game clinics, and performance assessments, with a focus on tailored instruction for individuals looking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulator for advanced swing analysis
Personalized one-on-one instruction tailored to individual needs
Video swing analysis included in every private lesson

simulator_hardware.notes: The website mentions a 'state-of-the-art golf simulator' but does not specify the brand or model.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no information on a food and drink menu or BYOB policy. It is best to check with the venue beforehand.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for playing 18 holes on the simulator. Time may vary based on the simulator's software and number of players.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior programs for young golfers, including sessions for nurturing young talents and developing a lifelong love for the game.
